summary: ProposalView page update testing - ALL FEATURES PASSED. Tested right sidebar with pricing breakdown, action buttons, and Terms & Policies tab with expandable accordions. All 21 features verified working as expected.

right_sidebar.details: Sidebar visible on large screens (lg breakpoint) with correct layout

edit_proposal_button_sidebar.details: EDIT PROPOSAL button in sidebar header with Menu icon

estimated_date_of_booking.details: Shows date '11 Mar 2026' in gray background box

elements_displayed: Price Breakdown header with Edit button

price_after_discount.details: Large text 'AED 1,500' with eye icon next to it

including_all_taxes_label.details: Gray text label visible below price after discount

mail_whatsapp_buttons.details: MAIL and WHATSAPP LINK buttons displayed side by side with gray border

payment_schedule_section.details: Yellow/amber background with 'AED 1,500 due on 08 Mar 2026'

chat_with_client_section.details: Section at bottom of sidebar with MessageSquare icon

any_other_commitments_section.details: Expandable with yellow alert box about service commitments

important_notes_section.details: Expanded by default with General, Hotel, Tours and Transfers, Europe subsections

accordion_expand_collapse.details: All accordion sections can be expanded/collapsed with chevron icon rotation

critical_code_review_comments: PriceSidebar component well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for buttons
ExpandableSection component uses AnimatePresence for smooth animations
Color choices match requirements: BOOK NOW (brown #8B4513), NEED HELP (magenta #D946EF)
Payment Schedule section uses Tailwind amber classes for yellow background
Important Notes section correctly defaults to expanded (defaultExpanded={true})
Console shows hydration error for tbody/tr elements in MyProposals.jsx - not blocking but should be fixed
seed_data_creation: None - used existing proposal (Option 1 - Trip to Tbilisi)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ProposalView right sidebar and Terms & Policies accordion testing complete. All features working. Test flow: Login (test@example.com/test123) -> My Leads -> My Proposals -> View Proposal. Sidebar visible at 1920px viewport. Use [data-testid='book-now-btn'], [data-testid='accept-proposal-btn'], [data-testid='need-help-btn'], [data-testid='sidebar-edit-proposal-btn'] for button testing.

notes.console_warning: Hydration error in MyProposals.jsx for tbody/tr elements - cosmetic issue, not blocking functionality
